visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown, slightly messy hair is shown in a close-up shot, facing a professional silver condenser microphone equipped with a black pop filter. He is wearing black Sony over-ear headphones. His expression is focused and emotional as he prepares to sing, standing against a simple teal curtain background that is softly lit. (2) The shot changes to a medium close-up, revealing more of his outfit: a dark pinstripe vest worn over a beige t-shirt. He begins to sing, his mouth moving in sync with the lyrics while he uses hand gestures near his chest to emphasize the emotional delivery. His eyes squint and his brow furrows deeply. (3) The editing switches between the tight close-up and the medium shot as the performance continues. The lighting remains consistent and bright throughout, typical of a studio setting. White subtitles appear at the bottom center of the frame, providing the text of the song he is performing. The camera is mostly static with minor handheld stabilization.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 來 你看著我的眼睛說. (2) [Subtitle]: 你從沒愛過我. (3) [Subtitle]: 再看著我的眼睛說. (4) [Subtitle]: 你一點都不難過. (5) [Subtitle]: 我雖然沒那麼懂事. (6) [Subtitle]: 但絕不攔你這一次. (7) [Subtitle]: 如果你說. (8) [Subtitle]: 想要回到有他在的城市. (9) [Subtitle]: 來 你看著我的眼睛說. (10) [Subtitle]: 你從沒愛過我. (11) [Subtitle]: 再看著我的眼睛說. (12) [Subtitle]: 你一點都不難過. (13) [Subtitle]: 我攥緊手裡的戒指. (14) [Subtitle]: 它本該有一個名字. (15) [Subtitle]: 如果你生日願望是. (16) [Subtitle]: 回到他身旁. (17) [Subtitle]: 我幫你這最後一次.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a male vocal singing in Mandarin, supported by a crisp piano instrumental. The vocal delivery is soulful and emotive, with a moderate pitch and clear articulation. The recording is pristine, characterized by a studio-clean silence with no ambient interference, indicating a high-fidelity capture environment. (2) As the song reaches the chorus, the vocal intensity swells with more projection and a wider pitch contour. A steady drum beat and synthesized string sections enter the mix, increasing the harmonic density. The singer’s breathiness adds texture to the emotional delivery, while the BGM maintains a consistent mid-tempo ballad pace. (3) The performance continues with high-energy vocal peaks where the singer belts with significant dominance. The interplay between the layered instrumental tracks and the primary vocal remains balanced and clear. There are no audible incidental noises or technical artifacts, maintaining a professional mastered quality throughout the timeline.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-quality vocal cover performance. It aims to showcase the artist's vocal ability and emotional range to an audience, likely for social media engagement or self-promotion, using professional studio equipment to ensure high production value.
